title: Ultimate Seedance Guide 2026: How to Use Seedance 2.0 For AI Video Generation
summary: Seedance 2.0 is an AI video generation tool capable of creating cinematic videos from text prompts, including features like native lip-sync, consistency preservation, and 4K upscaling. The guide demonstrates its application for production workflows including chase scenes, fight scenes, product ads, and compares it against Veo 3 and Kling 3.
